title: Dictionary comprehension should not use a static key
description: This rule checks for the use of a static key in dictionary comprehension, which can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Avoid using a static key in dictionary comprehension.

noncompliant.code: result = {i: value for i in range(10) if i % 2 == 0}

compliant.code: result = {key: value for key, value in zip(range(10), [1, 2, 3])}
compliant.description: Using a variable key from an iterable

why_is_this_an_issue: Using a static key in dictionary comprehension can lead to unexpected behavior if the key is used elsewhere in the code or if the order of the dictionary entries changes.
how_to_fix: Replace the static key with a variable key.
